personas.name: Alex Kim
personas.role: Requests paternity leave and receives approval confirmation

personas.name: Sarah Chen
personas.role: Reviews and approves Alex's paternity leave request

personas.name: Slackbot
personas.role: Guides paternity leave requests, enforces policy, and routes approvals

content.text: I want to apply for paternity leave.

Congrats, Alex! :baby: Here's what you need to know.

*Acme Inc Paternity Leave Policy*
• Eligible employees receive *2 weeks* of fully paid paternity leave
• Leave must be taken within 12 weeks of the child's birth or adoption
• Manager approval is required before leave begins

When you're ready, choose your dates and I'll route the request to Sarah for approval.

Choose an action below to continue.

All set! I've submitted your paternity leave request.

*Request summary*
• Type: Paternity Leave
• Dates: March 15 – 22, 2026
• Duration: 5 business days
• Approver: Sarah Chen

Sarah will be notified shortly. I'll let you know as soon as she responds.

Alex Kim has requested *paternity leave*.

*Request details*
• Dates: March 15 – 22, 2026
• Duration: 5 business days
• Policy check: Eligible :white_check_mark:

Please review and take action below.

Choose an action below to continue.

Done! I've recorded the approval and notified Alex.

*What I've handled*
• Leave status updated to *Approved*
• Alex has been informed via DM
• Calendar hold created for March 15 – 22

No further action needed on your end, Sarah.

Great news, Alex! :tada:

Sarah approved your paternity leave request. You're all set for *March 15 – 22, 2026*.

*What I've handled*
• Leave marked as approved in your workspace
• Your calendar has been blocked
• Out-of-office status will activate automatically on March 15

Enjoy every moment — you've earned it!
